relabelled_senses.definition: In wholesale; sold or distributed in large quantities, typically to retailers or resellers rather than to final consumers.
At retail; sold individually or in small quantities to final consumers.
At the present time; currently.
At the first attack or assault; upon the initial onslaught.
At first glance; by immediate visual inspection, forming a judgment or recognition on first sight.
Let him or her wear the cloak; used proverbially to mean 'if the description fits you, accept it' or 'if the remark applies to you, take it to yourself.'
In a short time; shortly; a little later.
At the top or highest point of something; on the summit.
To be ruined, spoiled, or come to nothing; to fail completely.
At random; done without order, method, or careful thought.
Alert and watchful; paying close attention; on the lookout.
the late hours of the night; very late at night
a twisted, mangled mass of metal; wreckage composed of crushed or entangled metal parts
in addition to; besides; apart from
a friendship that includes sexual activity without romantic commitment; 'friends with benefits'
A friendship in which the participants engage in sexual activity without establishing a romantic or committed relationship.
An immediate and intense romantic attraction felt upon first seeing another person.
To be in conflict with someone; to quarrel, argue, or be at odds.
To be on the lookout or watchful; to move about while keeping a careful watch for someone or something.
To behave in an affectedly shy, coy, or girlish manner, suggesting inexperience or coquettishness.
